mapper.select: SELECT contentId, wordId, haveTag, content FROM content ORDER BY contentId
SELECT contentId, wordId, haveTag, content FROM content WHERE contentId = #{contentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content (wordId, haveTag, content) VALUES (#{wordId}, #{haveTag}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE content SET contentId = #{contentId}, wordId = #{wordId}, haveTag = #{haveTag}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE contentId = #{contentId}
